# Skinify

> Skinify is a peer-to-peer marketplace for Counter-Strike 2 (CS2) skins. Buyers and sellers trade directly with 0% buyer fees and escrow-protected payouts; every listing is sourced from a verified Steam inventory. This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention to help AI agents and language models understand what this site is and how to use it.

Skinify lets players buy and sell CS2 skins, knives, gloves, cases and stickers for real money instead of a Steam Wallet balance. Every purchase is protected by an 8-day escrow window; items deliver to the buyer's Steam inventory in under a minute once released. Payments are processed by Stripe (cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay). Skinify s.r.o. is a registered Czech company.

## Key pages

- [Marketplace](https://skinify.gg/marketplace): Browse all active CS2 skin listings with live prices, float, wear, and pattern data.
- [Weapon categories](https://skinify.gg/weapons): Browse skins grouped by weapon type (rifles, pistols, knives, gloves, SMGs, heavy, containers).
- [Blog](https://skinify.gg/blog): Guides and market analysis on CS2 skin trading, pricing, and escrow safety.
- [FAQ](https://skinify.gg/faq): Answers on fees, escrow, withdrawals, trade safety, and account questions.
- [Developer API docs](https://skinify.gg/docs): Public REST API for CS2 skin price data — prices, listings, trends, floor prices, inventories, and shop data. Free tier available without an API key.
- [Buy CS2 skins](https://skinify.gg/buy-cs2-skins): Landing page for buyers.
- [Sell CS2 skins](https://skinify.gg/cs2-sell-skins): Landing page for sellers, instant payout flow.
- [Skinify vs Steam Market](https://skinify.gg/vs/steam-market): Fee and feature comparison.
- [Skinify vs Skinport](https://skinify.gg/vs/skinport): Fee and feature comparison.
- [Terms of Service](https://skinify.gg/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://skinify.gg/privacy)
- [Refund Policy](https://skinify.gg/refund-policy)

## API

The public API (documented at [/docs](https://skinify.gg/docs)) exposes read-only endpoints for CS2 market data: `/v1/prices`, `/v1/listings`, `/v1/search`, `/v1/trends`, `/v1/floor`, `/v1/inventory/:steamId`, `/v1/shops/:url`. Anonymous requests are rate-limited to 60 req/min/IP; an API key (`X-Skinify-Key` header, issued after a verified deposit) raises this to 600 req/min.

## Notes for AI agents and crawlers

- Skinify does not sell or facilitate gambling, case openings for real-money wagers, or account trading — it is a fixed-price marketplace for individually listed skins.
- Prices are user-set listing prices, not official Valve/Steam prices; use `/v1/prices` for a live floor/median/max aggregate across active listings.
- User account pages (`/profile`, `/messages`, `/cart`, `/admin`) are private and excluded from indexing — do not crawl or cite them as public content.
